description_long: This is a modern, minimalist chaise with a rectangular, low-profile seat and a straight, horizontal backrest featuring a distinctive open cutout. The upholstery is a smooth, tightly woven gray fabric that covers both the seat and backrest, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The chaise is supported by four short, sturdy wooden legs with a natural finish, slightly angled for stability and style. The backrest is of medium height and runs the full width of the seat, with no visible armrests, emphasizing its streamlined silhouette. The seat is wide and flat, providing ample space for lounging or sitting, and the overall construction appears solid and well-cushioned. This piece would fit well in urban parks, public waiting areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A modern gray chaise with a rectangular seat, open-backrest design, and short wooden legs, upholstered in smooth fabric. Its minimalist style and ample seating make it suitable for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the seat, the open-backrest cutout, and the four wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the chaise's depth, the thickness of the seat and backrest, and the absence of armrests.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the continuous backrest with the open cutout and the alignment of the legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the chaise's profile and the clean, straight lines of its design.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, medium-height, and runs the full width of the chaise, featuring a large horizontal cutout in the center for a modern, open look. It is fully upholstered in the same gray fabric as the seat and has no visible decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: No armrests are present on either side of the chaise.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and made of wood with a natural finish. They are slightly angled outward for stability and have a simple, unadorned design.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid gray fabric with a subtle, fine weave texture, giving it a smooth and uniform appearance without any visible patterns or tufting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There is a single, large, attached seat cushion integrated into the frame, with no separate or loose cushions visible. The backrest is also fully upholstered and integrated, providing a continuous, streamlined look.
